content.question: Did the 2017–2018 BTMN reform materially increase SNI reclassification rates, and by how much, controlling for general demand trends and improved assessment tools?
content.reduction_path: Commission a regression-discontinuity or synthetic-control study using SNI administrative counts in the 18 months before and after September 1, 2018, controlling for regional/school-level variation in BTMN enrollment baseline and assessment-tool adoption timing, with results cross-validated against school and parent survey data on reclassification experiences.
